title: Install particular version
body:
I want to install podman v1.5.0
How can i install a particular podman version?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out!  You can compile it from source.  To get the source you can clone the Git repository or download them directly from the release page (https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v1.5.0).

Note that v1.5.0 is two years old and not supported upstream anymore.  I recommend running the latest version of Podman.
Also Podman requires lots of other applications like runc, crun, containers-common, fuse-overlay. slirp4netns...  If these are not matching, bad things can also happen.

Or you could potentially use the container image that we have on quay.io   quay.io/podman/stable:v1.5.0

However, that's old enough that it might be a bit wonky....
